title: schnabelia terniflora
intro: Schnabelia terniflora, also known as the Chinese fern, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schnabelia terniflora include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Schnabelia terniflora is prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the leaves and stems are boiled in water to extract its medicinal properties.
